calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-06-2003 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Sep-18-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove Up hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack, CSR: Mary Ellen Scherer.
Max Lee Kelley, Esq. for Plaintiff, Key Bank USA, N.A.
After hearing the evidence presented and plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendant, David J. Tyreman.
Damages of $71,897.02.
Attorney's fees of $1,919.50.
Costs of $435.19.
Interest of $1,495.00, For the total of $75,746.71.
Does 1-25 are dismissed.
Judgment signed in open court.
